description: A minimalist white bed frame with a mattress covered in a striped duvet. The duvet features bold, horizontal stripes in shades of navy blue, orange, light blue, and white. A pillow with matching stripes is placed at the head of the bed. The bed appears to be a single-sized bed, ideal for a child's room or a small apartment. The simple design of the bed frame suggests a modern or Scandinavian aesthetic, while the colorful bedding adds a playful and vibrant touch. The shadows cast by the bed suggest it is placed on a flat, neutral surface.
